hb47ca855g4f85g417bg87f7g6de4bf0116db: Hey! You tryin' to slip us somethin'?
h2a1334a3g9f2bg4a6aga171g91241add8310: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h611f458fg6bdfg4b47g82e0g5b63f84a4d15: Don't be stupid. You can barely see straight.
h4aa3f977g0694g47a5gb14bg08e44431c851: A lethal poison. Enough to take the lot of you down.
h9b471fa0gd7ebg4412gb7c7g13009a16b6c2: Just a drop of firewine. It'll give the brew a real kick.
h69a42f48gda6cg43f6g80e6g6fc80f9b73a3: Eh. Heh. Now that's an idea. Should've thought of that myself!
h104af32eg26a0g4d03g9023g85be0ded48a4: This guy's tryin' to poison us! Kill him!
h86b6dfbbg38d2g48dfg8489g1c2e95d2a80d: This gal's tryin' to poison us! Kill her!
hbf921949ge4a3g4375g9c49g38a8c11b8038: I'll slip a knife between your ribs if you don't piss off.
ha833c866g14dfg4fd1g8fe3g07730a002664: Tnak. Fine. Hope Gribbo drinks it. At least then she'll shut up 'bout her bloody pigeon!
hf9de89fdgc82cg4924gbd84g5f4d64108ec8: Listen, uh, I got me some business over on the other side of yonder mountain. See you never, yeah?
hd435db8fg7d2eg4c38g8004g296a815dfedc: You don't know who you're messin with. I'll kill you and eat you like that dwarf!
hacac3effgf4a8g4f46g8462g907fcb82cf56: You saw nothing, or I'll crush your eyes like grapes. Got it?
h547b917ag0838g46f6g8ce9gd7805d777a8a: Palm the poison vial and feign innocence.
he3fbacf4g6718g4e4ag8d70ga2c87a2f87d8: Drink must be tellin' on me. Guess I need some more. Heh.
h99836bf0ga6a7g4c88ga3d5g5941ff31de12: Don't think I didn't see that with yer slippery fingers.
h66953bc0g2089g4865gb1cag09a14f5cd99f: Urk. The world's spinnin'... Heh. Her horns look like snakes, all wriggly. Damn, this is some good beer.
h36de0be4g9116g4c68gbdd4gc9a5ba1bbd5d: Urk. The world's spinnin'... Heh. His horns look like snakes, all wriggly. Damn, this is some good beer.
he0d6cf1cg3014g4551ga22cg16931608b384: Urk. The world's spinnin'... Heh. The stones look alive, all wriggly. Damn, this is some good beer.
he9643f2cg9a6eg420ag9df1gc03dde651f2a: What-cha... this guy's some booyahg! He's tryna magick me!
h411ee000g5f73g4ff1g8794ga181a994d8d1: What-cha... this woman's some booyahg! She's tryna magick me!
h0cfa6278g5878g4d6cga8f1gc30c23ae7463: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h63f06883g9ef1g4c39g9e13g746d5baa91ea: Turn around and walk away. Do not question the will of the Absolute.
hf860b0acg9e34g4e5bga756g7c3d2e4107c6: Turn around and walk away. Do not question the will of the Absolute.
ha377cd56gedc7g4543g8c20g905538b08d79: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h8bcbc9dbg2845g45f3g8173ga8b654a7553d: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
ha32f87e5g5a33g47bbg9300g57b57776fb06: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hdb4744a9ge540g4466g9d62g74eb333c65ce: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
heab76467g31c3g4aaag9c9agf3fd51182c3a: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h35056f6fgdefdg46e7g81dag6b9bac6217c8: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
hd295f229g74b0g4207g8807gc5e9a9f4026e: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h56f46f73g3f5dg4f6fgb249g14a6dacb4903: Like hells. I don't know what you're gettin' at, but answer the question. What were you doin'?
h1ddc0644g3337g47eagbbbbg87caa437b306: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
